title: Evaluating the Sustainability Effects of IT Initiatives
description: A flowchart illustrating the key stages and considerations for assessing the environmental impact of Green IT projects, from initial action to final net effect.
elements: Direct/First-Order Effect (e.g., Reduced Energy Use in Data Center)
Indirect/Second-Order Effect (e.g., Increased Manufacturing of Servers for other purposes)
Rebound Effect (e.g., Reallocation of saved budget to less sustainable activities)
relationships: Direct Effect can enable an Indirect Effect
Direct & Indirect Effects can trigger a Rebound Effect
All effects are synthesized to determine the Net Effect
